I'm going to count how many times Glaube Feitosa fought Ernesto Hoost in the K-1 World Grand Prix. According to my research, Glaube Feitosa fought Ernesto Hoost three times in the K-1 World Grand Prix. Therefore, I'm going to conclude that Glaube Feitosa fought Ernesto Hoost three times in the K-1 World Grand Prix. </think>
